programme.desc: Matt and CJ stumble upon a homeless man who shockingly turns out to be someone they know very well. Meanwhile, Mitch must rescue a boy's brother from drug smugglers so the boy can receive a life-saving transplant of his brother's bone marrow.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When testing out a new flying machine, Mitch spots a makeshift raft with a stranded woman in it. Mitch must help the Chinese woman find her sister. Back at headquarters, Matt and Garner deal with a beach robbery scam.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Prominent British businessman Richard Branson visits Baywatch to perform several risky stunts, putting the lifeguards on high alert. Meanwhile, Mitch has to save one of Kaye's employees whose violent husband has come looking for her.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch considers a new career working with Garner as a private eye. Logan cheats on Caroline again. The explosion of an offshore oil rig endangers Stephanie, Cody, and Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: As the crippled oil rig sinks and floods with water, Cody, Neely, and Stephanie begin a desperate rescue effort to save the two young couples, and themselves, until the Baywatch lifeguards can arrive to help.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Kaye Morgan asks Hobie to volunteer at a school for young blind children. Things take a dangerous turn when a huge brush fire traps Hobie and the blind children in the hills, and Mitch is the only one who can save them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline tries to stop her sister from making the worst mistake of her life. Cody and Neely rescue two surfers that fall ill due to a highly polluted beach. Mitch enlists the Beach Boys for a benefit concert to raise money to clean up the pollution.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch's mother arrives in town for a visit, and after some strange occurrences, he insists she sees a doctor. Meanwhile, Cody loses the motivation to continue his Olympic training and it is up to Stephanie to reinspire him.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie, CJ, and Caroline go on a girls-only junior lifeguard trip to Catalina which turns dire when two of the girls get trapped in a flooded cave. Meanwhile, a woman who dies in a car accident bequeaths an odd inheritance to Mitch…

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Hobie's new friend Isaac is an angry kid who will do anything to get his father's attention. His risky behavior is a problem for the lifeguards. Meanwhile, Caroline meets a jockey who has lost the will to race after an accident.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan borrows Cody's car without permission and has an accident, then lies to the police. Meanwhile, the Baywatch team settles an internal dispute with a paintball war and C.J. takes in an injured sea lion, causing problems with her roommates.

programme.desc: Matt Brody returns to Baywatch and ends up trapped on a yacht with Neely when a group of ruthless pirates takes hostages. Meanwhile, Joey's past may jeopardize her adoption by Mitch.

programme.desc: Tensions run high in this father/daughter battle conclusion. McKinley, 18, confronts her dad for allegedly being "abusive" in her childhood & a "pedophile," claims he denies. Dr. Phil questions Cory on an incident leading to Cory's sexual battery arrest.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Carol & Tab's 20-year-old son, Alex, was killed by a hit-and-run driver. They believe that Alex's death was no accident claiming Rob, 24, of being responsible. Rob, joined by his family, say he's falsely accused & part of an "unrelenting witch hunt".

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dana says daughter Melanie, 23, is a drug abuser whose behavior is ripping apart their peaceful family. Melanie admits to experimenting with drugs but says she's not addicted & she blames her mom for pushing her buttons and causing her to lose her cool.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A 17-year-old football star accused of rape -- and the alleged victim, a 16-year-old classmate -- speak out about how one alcohol-fueled night changed their lives in an instant. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Victoria wrote to Dr. Phil after she says her daughter, Jessica, 18, physically attacked her on multiple occasions, leaving a gash in her head from a cellphone & her house damaged, as well as her body bruised after a Thanksgiving day family throw down.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Divorced in 2007, Doug & Beverly are against each other, citing drug use, abuse, & parental alienation. They admit their son, 15, & daughter, 9, are stuck in the middle. Can these exes stop pointing the finger and come together for the sake of the kids?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Did Rebecca Zahau take her own life or foul play? Questions surrounding the woman's death have the family in search of answers. Attorney Anne Bremner & private investigator Paul Ciolino reveal possible evidence. Rebecca's sister Mary talks about her life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his discussion with Willie Jessop, former spokesperson for the FLDS and former bodyguard of self-proclaimed prophet Warren Jeffs. Jessop comes face-to-face with former FLDS members and critics who say they don't believe a word he says.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Elsa says she was abused daily & beaten with ropes, chains, whips & umbrellas by the people she thought were her adoptive parents, Joe and his wife, Evangeline. Elsa says the abuse lasted for 19 years until an unlikely person stepped up to rescue her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Susie says she's at the end of her rope raising her 4-yr-old granddaughter & says daughter Adriana, 20, neglects her duties to spend time boyfriend Matt. Adriana strongly denies. Matt says he's judged for past drug use. Don't miss this emotional Dr. Phil.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Women: Are you dying to know what men really think? Comedian and radio and TV host Steve Harvey has all the "manswers"! In his book, Straight Talk, No Chaser, Steve dishes the dirt about unlocking the male mind and understanding the male game.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kristi said it was love at first sight when she met Michael. They married, had three kids, but when the union went awry nine years later, they divorced, and are now in an all-out war affecting the most vulnerable members of the family — the children.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: For the past 2 years Nancy has been in an online relationship with "Shaun" she says is an honest and loving man. Her son Darcy says Nancy doesn't even know what he looks like! Nancy is adamant she is not being scammed in this catfish story of online love.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Widow Sebrina, 56, says she’s in love with her overseas boyfriend, “James,” but they've never met. She sent him more than $250,000, emptying her life savings, with payback when they marry. Is she a catfish victim? Dr. Phil confronts “James” on the phone!

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed sends Elly to the Beverly Hills dress boutique he used to own (now the House of Maurice) to learn how to be a lady, where Mrs. Drysdale mistakes her for royalty.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale wants Jed to incorporate for the tax advantages. So the Clampetts take over the top floor of the Commerce Bank and start doing what they can to stimulate the economy by getting more money into the hands of more people.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's driving and Ellie's cooking makes a policeman and a cab driver think that the Clampett Mansion is a mental institution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale gets Jed's old cabin from back home and sets it up in the Clampett's backyard to surprise Granny on her birthday. A coed with a sociology major thinks that they live there as the Drysdale's servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale buys Mammoth Pictures, a movie studio. Jed, Granny, Elly and Jethro try to "help" the studio, which is losing money, by working at the studio.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tells the Clampetts that he is building a city on the location where Jed's movie studio is located. The Clampetts mistake a western prop town for the city.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she can get the hillbillies to move out by throwing herself at Jed. Meanwhile Granny is itching to fight her because she fell into the cement pond when Jed had to stop a fight between them earlier.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: An old friend from back in the hills is now an Elvis like singing idol. The Clampetts misunderstand the situation and decide to help Johnny get on his feet.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Johnny Poke's mother arrives from the Ozarks and Granny's matchmaking begins. Jed and Emma Poke come up with a plan to discourage her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale needs Jed to donate $190,000 to save the Beverly Hills Ballet but he has his hands full trying to keep Granny from heading back to the hills pushing all her stuff in a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the butler into staying on, posing as a boarder, so that he can teach the Clampetts how to be more civilized.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts still don't realize that Mr. Pinckney is their butler instead of their boarder. When he tries to leave them Granny thinks he trying to skip without paying his rent.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Hospitalized for nerves from dealing with the hillbillies Mrs. Drysdale threatens Mr. Drysdale to stay there until he gets rid of them and even sending for a specialist. Unfortunately, the Clampet clan is on their way to visit her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital. The Clampetts, unhappy with what they feel as the hospital's poor level of care, break her out and set her up in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May goes to Jed's studio to be in a movie and meet a potential husband.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Ellie May loses another suitor to Miss Jane in another case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts accidentally run into a beatnik he moves into the Clampett mansion, but neither he nor they know what to make of each other.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: As a favor to Jed Mr. Drysdale arranges for a playboy bank director (who normally only dates women half his age) to come court Granny, while Jed goes out with a beautiful woman who dates rich older men.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants Jed to find a wife and asks for Mr. Drysdale's help. He introduces Jed to Phyllis but learns too late she a gold digger and becomes alarmed when they head to the track. But it's Granny they need to worry about.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to become a "double naught" spy and converts the family's truck into his idea of a Bondmobile. But he becomes the unwitting pawn in another banker's scheme.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's biggest rival John Cushing succeeds in getting the Clampetts to transfer all of their money to his bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drydale's poodle Claude is to enter a dog show but gets sick right before. Granny offers to doctor the dog but Ellie Mae is concerned he doesn't know any tricks so she decides to help out with one of her own pets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: John Brewster, the oilman from Tulsa, is bringing his new bride to California for their honeymoon. Somehow the Clampetts get the idea that their backyard rustic cabin is the ideal place for the Brewsters to stay.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Donna fills in for Lisa at a convenience store. A young boy is caught stealing a teddy bear for his brother's birthday, but Donna covers for him. Brandon alienates Nat and Susan as he gets carried away during the After Dark's charity casino night.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Cindy surprises Brandon by coming to visit for Christmas. Joe tries to keep an antsy Donna in suspense about her Christmas/birthday present.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly's father swoops into town, and once again sweeps her off of her feet with promises of a relationship. Nat is reunited with an old-flame.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly takes refuge back with Colin, and ends up on a bender.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Susan is nominated for a college journalism award for her story about a girl's decision to have an abortion. Valerie arranges a meeting between Colin and a knowledgeable art buyer in the hopes of encouraging Colin to get clean and focus on his career.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie's really annoying friend Ginger returns to town. Clare and Donna confront Kelly after finding drugs in the apartment. Brandon, Steve and Joe accept Jonathan's invitation to go flying in biplanes.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie tries to pacify Ginger by setting her up with Jonathan. Donna's sorority asks students to go without sex for 24 hours in order to promote abstinence as a means of preventing venereal diseases. Clare bets that Steve cannot make good on his pledge.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Colin visits Kelly and announces that he has kicked his cocaine habit. Kelly gets a roommate, a troubled teenage runaway named Tara. Valerie has the house to herself as Steve and Brandon leave for a ski weekend with Clare, Susan and David.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon and Susan spend the weekend at her parents' house. Colin and Valerie's new relationship upsets David and Kelly. Joe's older brother Hank comes to town and tries to discourage him from undergoing surgery.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Valerie puts the club up as collateral to bail Colin out of jail. Kelly comes home from rehab and Donna is put off by the frequent phone calls from a lonely Tara. Clare, Susan, Brandon and Steve organize a romantic evening for the Nat and Joan.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Rush dumps Ryan and Austin off on Steve on the same day that he is hosting a fraternity party. Kelly invites Tara to stay with her after she finishes her stint in rehab.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Brandon, Steve, and Joe go on a camping trip with Susan, Clare, and Donna. The girls become jealous when the guys repeatedly ignore them to help some damsels in distress. Tara sabotages Kelly's relationship with Greg.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Austin para investigar a las víctimas encontradas allí con sus relojes a la hora equivocada, una pista que puede conectar los delitos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el asesinato de un infante de marina, el equipo de NCIS descubre un laberinto de cámaras espías que transmiten en vivo, escondidas en las habitaciones de un motel de Virginia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un músico de la banda más elitista de la Armada que actúa en eventos diplomáticos en todo el mundo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga el asesinato de un suboficial que se transmitió en vivo en una popular aplicación de juegos. Además, Gibbs cuidará a su vecino de 11 años, Phineas (Jack Fisher), porque su madre debe irse en un viaje de última hora.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo ayudan a Ziva (Cote de Pablo) con “la única cosa” de la que dijo que tendría que encargarse antes de regresar con su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Imprudente
programme.desc: Frank debe descubrir la verdad cuando un agente encubierto acusa a un compañero de brutalidad policial. Además, Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un famoso fotógrafo acusado recientemente de agresión por sus antiguas modelos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Niebla de guerra
programme.desc: Danny y Baez trabajan con el Ranger de Texas Waylon Gates (Lyle Lovett) cuando les encargan un caso para encontrar al Asesino de la Estrella Solitaria.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Intereses personales
programme.desc: Jamie está siendo investigado después de que su chaleco de policía sea encontrado en un delincuente, y Frank se debate entre ayudar y proteger a un viejo amigo, Chuck Kennedy (Ed Asner), cuya casa ha sido invadida.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Los primeros 100 días
programme.desc: Frank y Garrett idean un plan para convencer al alcalde Chase de que colabore mejor con los demás para dirigir correctamente la ciudad.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras tanto, Reid encara una pérdida en su vida personal, el resto de la UAC viaja a San Francisco para investigar a las víctimas descubiertas en Mission District.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las hijas de Bruce Morrison, una escritor cuya esposa desapareció misteriosamente el año pasado, desaparecen en el aniversario de la desaparición de su madre, el BAU debe estudiar a Morrison como un posible sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Austin para investigar a las víctimas encontradas allí con sus relojes a la hora equivocada, una pista que puede conectar los delitos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are called to a vehicle burglary in progress at an apartment complex. A traffic stop results in the discovery of drug paraphernalia. An officer locates a stolen van and discovers drug paraphernalia in the suspect’s purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a threatening man with a weapon. A man gives officers a false name forgetting he’s wearing his name tag. A suspect in a stolen car collides with another vehicle then flees on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disturbed naked man is spotted in a park covered in blood. Officers find a nude couple in a U-Haul truck. A traffic stop over a minor violation turns into a dangerous pursuit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a man who attempted to cash a bad check then fled the scene. Police are called when a man’s ex-girlfriend breaks into his house. Police chase an unlicensed teen speeding in a vehicle

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car pursuit turned foot chase ends with the suspect jumping head first into a creek-bed. Officers catch up to a man trying to flee the scene after assaulting his wife. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle driving with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend a man in possession of stolen property brandishing a rifle. Officers respond to a call of brothers in a fist fight. Police intervene when a couple argues in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers detect a strong odor of marijuana during a routine traffic stop. A woman tells officers her inebriated boyfriend smashed a window. Police investigate a suspicious vehicle parked behind a cemetery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a highspeed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police contact the Fire Department and alert the guests when they spot a motel fire. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects lead officers on a reckless car chase on residential streets. Police tend to a woman assaulted by her inebriated friend. A DWI suspect is found relieving himself in a public port-a-potty.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop becomes dangerous when the suspect takes off on the interstate. Officers find a large bag of drugs in a man’s pants. Officers respond to a dispute at a familiar location.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a suspect hoarding drugs inside a motel room. A driver admits to drug and alcohol use after being pulled over. Officers assist in the search for a runaway child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man runs from police over a parole violation. Officers respond when a trouble maker is expelled from a bar for bad behavior. Police pursue a man after he bails from his car during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue two suspects fleeing from a stolen vehicle. A drunk driver is pulled over after a brief chase. Officers receive a call for help from a juvenile about an attempted break-in.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers spot a suspected stolen vehicle and a pursuit ensues. Officers are called to a fight at a bar over a tossed drink. Police are called to the scene of two intoxicated siblings arguing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect driving a stolen vehicle. A biohazard bin an illegal knife and drugs are found during a traffic stop. Agents go undercover in an area known for heavy drug activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man involved in a drug deal claims he works for the task force. An irate woman slams the front door when officers arrive. Police pull over two young suspects in an area known for drug activity.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Multiple units pursue a stolen vehicle on the run. A woman tells officers her intoxicated boyfriend destroyed her mailbox then fled. A loaded shotgun is found in a vehicle after a brief pursuit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect with a suspended license claims he’s not drunk. Officers track an armed robber. An armed and dangerous suspect hides from officers in an apartment complex.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called to a burglary at a warehouse housing expensive items. Police are called to the scene of a threatening man with a knife. Officers thwart an attempted suicide during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a bizarre slow-speed chase after a suspect’s failure to stop. A woman is pulled over after leaving a known drug house. An officer pursues two illegal drag racers on a public highway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are assaulted by the brother of a suspect who is resisting arrest. A resident sprays water on his neighbor’s noisy dogs. Officers recover drugs and cash after pulling over a motorist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen being driven backwards on a one-way street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a driver who ran a stop sign. A suspect wearing a D.A.R.E. T-shirt is found to be in possession of drugs. A woman claims the drugs found in the vehicle she’s sleeping in are not hers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: At a swanky fundraiser, attended by the sheriff, a woman turns up dead in the pool.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a mall parking garage. She's raped, beaten, shot and left for dead. Sara collects evidence from her and grows attached to her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A couple leaving a restaurant on their anniversary are killed in the street and their car is stolen. The crime scene is compromised when it rains shortly after the CSIs arrive.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two teenage girls run over a deaf man with their car, but they didn't kill him - he was already dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Warrick take the case of a jogger who was killed by a wild animal in the park. It gets complicated when they discover that the jogger had his liver removed after he was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: On the day Grissom has to evaluate his team, a head is found in the trunk of a car. While Gil and Catherine work on the head, Sara and Nick investigate a body in the desert that's missing its head.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is investigating the ongoing murders by a signature killer. The killer has some knowledge of forensics and has left little evidence behind.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and crew are called in after high roller Tony Braun, a known drug addict, is found dead in his house by a gardener.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The entire CSI team investigates a disappearance at a local university.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates a possible suicide at a high-profile construction site.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the class clown at the local high school is found murdered, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara and Warrick are called in to investigate an abandoned, blood-splattered apartment and Nick and Catherine must examine a dead scuba diver lodged in a tree.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI descubre que un traficante fallecido también era un experto en balística, tienen que trabajar con el FBI para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa del Dr. Robbins descubre el cuerpo de un hombre muerto desnudo en su dormitorio principal, el equipo de CSI se hace muchas preguntas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Willows vuelve a trabajar con el FBI después de que ocurre un golpe profesional en un bufete de abogados que ella recomendó a su amiga.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se despide de Catherine Willows mientras toma una decisión que cambiará su vida.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer es encontrada muerta y su cabello arreglado al estilo de los años 70 y ropa vintage, el equipo de CSI descubre pistas que apuntan a un asesino con un fetiche por el cabello.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Russell pide consejo a una antigua colega sobre un caso relacionado con la muerte de la exnovia de un hombre. Elisabeth Shue se une al elenco como la nueva CSI Julie Finlay.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una casa es totalmente robada de sus cimientos, el equipo de CSI busca respuestas. Mientras tanto, la nueva CSI Julie Finlay muestra su habilidad en el análisis de sangre.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un apagón paraliza la ciudad, el equipo de CSI debe volver a los métodos de la vieja escuela para resolver el caso de un niño desaparecido.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para resolver el caso de un estudiante asesinado recientemente de quien la foto de su muerte termina siendo tendencia en internet.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al equipo de CSI para investigar un robo y homicidio en una boda con el tema de “Alicia en el país de las maravillas”, no tienen mucho con qué trabajar para hallar al asesino. (Estrella invitada Jaclyn Smith)

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se llama al equipo de CSI para investigar a un hombre a quien le disparan a quemarropa en un casino local, cerraron todo el edificio en busca del asesino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Stokes se entera de que se anulará la condena de un hombre al que ayudó a encarcelar, el equipo de CSI debe probar nuevamente que el asesino es culpable o será liberado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba mata a un conductor de camión de carreras todoterreno en mitad de la carrera, se llama al equipo de CSI a la escena para investigar por qué.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga tres cadáveres a pocas cuadras de una cena de campaña, ellos creen saber quién es el asesino antes de hacer un descubrimiento impactante.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex campaigns against a sex offender who moves into her neighborhood and then becomes embroiled in controversy when the man is murdered soon thereafter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: What begins as a case of apparent Road Rage leads the CSI team to the investigation of a stolen $4 million necklace, which is tied to a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a white supremacist is acquitted for the murder of his wife after learning she is racially mixed, it’s up to Horatio to bring the killer down.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A band of masked gunmen invade an upscale spa, with the female customers' luxury cars as their booty. A customer is injured in the melee.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The bodies of two men, shot execution-style, are discovered in an abandoned hotel slated for demolition. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A cell phone call leads the team to investigate a kidnapping that, unless they reach the victim before it’s too late, could soon become a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young, ultra-glam heiress and media darling is found electrocuted in her bathtub during a party, and there is no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of a cruise ship passenger, the team discovers that a murder has also taken place on the ship.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI Team is on high alert when the deadly Mala Noche gang initiates a shooting rampage during the trial of one of their members.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio’s search for Antonio Riaz continues. The Feds take over the lab and investigate each team member when $12,000 is missing from a drug bust.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In pursuit of Marisol's killer, Horatio and Delko go to Brazil to avenge her death. In Rio, they are close to catching Riaz, Marisol's killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a male model is murdered, Horatio and the CSI team must enter the high stakes world of modeling in order to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a celebrity is murdered at an A-list party, the CSIs uncover a counterfeit ring producing a hundred dollar bills. Horatio investigates.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team must investigate when Calleigh is run off the road into a canal, compromising crime scene evidence she just collected.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la investigación de un millonario muerto lleva al equipo de CSI a un servicio de citas de elite, Ryan se hace pasar por un empresario para exponer las mentiras del casamentero.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el agua de una boca de incendios se lleva toda la evidencia de la escena del crimen, el equipo de CSI debe recrear un doble asesinato muy extraño.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en un partido de roller derby, lo único más corto que las faldas de las chicas es su paciencia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami arde en crímenes y caos cuando Memmo Fiero, el asesino de la esposa de Horatio Caine, regresa para tomar el control de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI tratan de descubrir cuál de los nerdos se vengó cuando un bravucón de la escuela secundaria murió apedreado.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer escapa por poco de la muerte a manos de un asesino en serie, Horatio hará cualquier cosa para rastrear al psicópata.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren un club de caza exclusivo donde la presa es humana, el juego más peligroso de todos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un chofer de camión de reparto y un ama de casa de su ruta son asesinados, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI intentan encontrar una conexión.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un presidiario fugitivo toma a Natalia como rehén y le cuenta un secreto impactante sobre sus crímenes. Horatio Caine y el resto del equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine ha decidido proteger a un luchador de artes marciales mixtas de su peligroso hermano que recientemente se escapó de la cárcel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI encuentra a una universitaria muerta en un jacuzzi, investiga un caso marcado por celos, psicosis y compañeros de cuarto de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio Caine persigue a un misterioso sospechoso de asesinato, descubre que toda la vida del hombre es una elaborada farsa.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que Horatio captura al último fugitivo de la cárcel, su avión de transporte realiza un aterrizaje forzoso y se descubre que el fugitivo tiene planeado algo más que una fuga.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Las vidas de Horatio y Natalia penden de un hilo mientras Horatio se interpone entre Natalia y una muerte segura.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Det. Lovato’s cover is inadvertently blown, the CSI's investigate the Latin street gang she infiltrated when undercover.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team investigates a 1920s-inspired speakeasy when one of its owners is murdered and $10,000 goes missing.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team is confronted with a puzzling mystery when two different victims are linked by the same unusual weapon.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beloved off-duty NYPD officer perishes in a robbery, the CSIs use the art of interrogation to break down their suspects and get to the truth.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a masked man is found at the bottom of a notorious skyscraper known for its history of mysterious deaths.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young pizza maker is carjacked, the CSI New York team of investigators must determine what the perpetrators were really after.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team partner with D.B. Russell to outsmart Christine’s kidnappers before they run out of time to save her life.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Detective Mac Taylor and the rest of the CSI New York team tackle three twisted tales of love gone wrong.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Community unrest over the police shooting of an unarmed man forces Mac and the CSI New York team to move quickly to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor discovers the body of a woman in Brooklyn Heights, when his investigation leads him to a serial killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Danny Messer go underground, entering the world of the ‘Sandhogs,’ men who burrow beneath New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Stella Bonasera and Danny Messer’s mission to find a brutal rapist is hindered, as the victim has no memory of the assault.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A practical joke spirals into a century spanning murder mystery when a skeleton placed on a tour bus turns out to be authentic.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSIs Investigate when New York’s hottest DJ is found dead minutes before being crowned the undisputed “scratching” champion.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Una estrella en ascenso del roller derby cae muerta en medio de una pelea y Mac y Stella llegan a la pista para investigar la muerte.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Encuentran a un multimillonario muerto en su habitación, cuando Danny comienza a procesar la escena, activa un botón de pánico y queda encerrado con la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una atractiva joven fue encontrado a una milla de su auto abandonado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Evidencia del Jefe
programme.desc: Se detalla el asesinato en Seattle de 1996 de la pareja suburbana Raquel Rivera y Jay Johnson. La evidencia del perro, Chief, de la pareja finalmente vincula a uno de los asesinos a la escena.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un choque mortal en 1983 causado por el equipo de seguridad de la reina de Inglaterra durante una visita a California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Shannon Melendi, de 19 años, desapareció mientras estaba en la Universidad de Emory. Su desaparición permaneció un misterio durante diez años, hasta que una nueva prueba científica proporcionó una nueva pista sobre Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue el accidente automovilístico más mortal en la historia de los Estados Unidos. Casi un centenar de vehículos participaron, doce personas murieron y más de cincuenta resultaron heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Bruce Miller fue asesinado a tiros en la oficina del negocio de depósito de chatarra que poseía. La escena del crimen estaba casi inmaculada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Vestido para Matar
programme.desc: Se sospecha del padre de una niña cuando ella es asesinada, pero años después la policía se entera que un asesino condenado vivía cerca. Pequeñas gotas de sangre ayudan a la policía a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Llamado desde Casa
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato en Florida atraviesa jurisdicciones de New York y Jamaica.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pista elemental
programme.desc: Cuando dos mujeres del mismo pueblo fueron asesinadas de la misma manera, la policía temió que un asesino en serie estuviera suelto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Genes delatores
programme.desc: Un perfil de comportamiento hizo que el Departamento de Policía de Baton Rouge buscara al hombre equivocado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerto al cirujano cardíaco Darryl Sutorius en el sótano de su lujosa casa de Cincinnati, la policía asume que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros en su tienda solo un día antes de testificar contra el hombre acusado de robarla.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas reveladoras
programme.desc: La desaparición de la atleta universitaria de Filadelfia, Aimee Willard, es investigada después de que su carro fuera encontrado al costado de la carretera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pelo de perro
programme.desc: Sin evidencia forense dentro de la escena del crimen, los investigadores estaban desconcertados. Pero sospecharon que el perro de la víctima había sido testigo del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad de 2005, se encuentra el cuerpo de un hombre ardiendo cerca de Baltimore. Finalmente fue identificado como Wesley Person, de 26 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la policía encuentra el cuerpo de Krista Harrison, de 11 años, hay pocas pistas sobre la identidad del asesino. Pero las autoridades están intrigadas por las inusuales fibras naranjas incrustadas en la ropa que se encuentran cerca de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Ryan Stallings, de cuatro meses, muere en circunstancias sospechosas, su madre finalmente es condenada por su asesinato. Pero meses después, surgen nuevas pruebas de una fuente sorprendente – su hermano recién nacido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que una pelea callejera le quitó la vida a un campeón nacional de lucha libre, la policía tuvo que determinar si fue asesinado a sangre fría o en defensa propia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre un brutal ataque a dos niños cerca de un estanque se basa en pruebas extraídas de las aguas turbias. Fue el primer caso en el que se utilizó evidencia de Diatomea (algas) para ubicar a un sospechoso en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Darrell North, un gerente de construcción, fue encontrado muerto en su tráiler del trabajo en Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Poco después del amanecer, se inicia un incendio en un contenedor de basura en Vancouver. Nadie ve al pirómano ni el fuego, que arde durante horas en el estacionamiento desolado. Pero hay más que basura en este contenedor en llamas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de una Convención de Filadelfia, 180 legionarios contraen síntomas similares a la neumonía y 29 de ellos mueren. La determinación de un científico ayuda a identificar la causa de esta enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: The earth split in India 66 million years ago in a disaster that may have caused the end of the dinosaurs.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: According to new evidence, the Woolly Mammoth went on roaming until about the time the Pyramids were built.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Horizon follows scientists across the world on a quest to solve the riddle of the Hobbit.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring the idea of human coexistence with dinosaurs. Had the species not disappeared from the face of earth ages ago, keeping them as pets could have been a possibility.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Until recently most scientists thought they knew what killed off the dinosaurs. It was a 10 km-wide meteorite which smashed into Yucatan in Mexico.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Wildlife on One
programme.desc: Fossil remains serve as clues in discovering how prehistoric flying creatures lived.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community, where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids, and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit of this case takes them into some parts of Oahu, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado, and they face a special challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today it's the threat of severe thunderstorm, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Vancouver Island's glaciers fuel the flow of some of Canada's tallest waterfalls, and an endless network of rivers and creeks provides the ideal habitat for one of the world's most important fish – the pacific salmon.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: The Philippines are a chain of around 7,000 tropical islands in the western Pacific. Plants-turned- predators line the edge of the forests, while rivers help carve one of the world's most spectacular cave systems.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: The Falkland's bleak, battered and windswept archipelago lies 460 km from the South American mainland. Rugged mountains and expansive pristine coastline remain unspoilt by human development.

programme.title: Wildest latin america
programme.desc: This film uncovers what makes the Amazon such a powerhouse of evolution; how it has come to home a third of all species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest latin america
programme.desc: Patagonia is the southernmost part of South America. It's a place of extremes – of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts and violent oceans.

programme.title: Wildest latin america
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds – forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the waters of a mighty river: the Orinoco.

programme.title: Wildest latin america
programme.desc: In the centre of South America, a vast, wild expanse: the world's largest wetland. But this is no ordinary swamp. Every year it's drowned by immense floods, and then parched by severe drought.

programme.title: Wildest latin america
programme.desc: The longest chain of mountains in the world at 7200km, the Andes run the length of western South America and dictate the climate for the whole continent.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: This episode explores nature's deadliest killers. From a tiny but deadly insect, to a pod of hungry Orca's, predators come in all sizes, and are found on every continent on Earth.

programme.title: Wildest Survival
programme.desc: Whether by wing, fin or hoof, epic migrations are among nature's most awe-inspiring events. Animals undertake these arduous journeys, for many reasons: to find a mate, to give birth, or to move to new feeding grounds.

programme.title: Sharks: The Big Five
programme.desc: The ocean has its own Big Five. Featuring great whites, to hammerheads, tigers, bulls, and the intimidating whale shark, this is the ultimate shark show.

programme.title: Sharks, Scavengers of the Seas
programme.desc: Before being an earthly paradise with enchanting colours, the lagoon of New Caledonia is above all a paradise for sharks. But not just any sharks: they are used to being considered as fearsome predators, they are essentially opportunistic scavengers.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, more than a dozen children in Seattle, Washington, were fighting for their lives. Each one of them had contracted a serious unknown illness. After one died, investigators knew the clock was ticking.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, police struggle to identify a suspect. Some fibers and a study of the weather patterns on the night of the murder break the case open and reveal the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests low-level drug dealer James Wren, who confesses. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators question the authenticity of the confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nancy Newman and her two daughters are found brutally murdered. The crime scene has no shortage of evidence, but investigators cannot find a conclusive link to their prime suspect. To solve the puzzle, an FBI analyst designs a unique experiment.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This examination of the role autopsies play in murder investigations focuses on the suspicious death of Virginia Ridley. Police charge her mentally unstable husband with murder, but a medical examiner discovers that she died of natural causes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the decomposed body of a teenage girl is discovered, police have no clues to her identity. To solve the case, investigators turn to bug larvae found on the body and a tiny wad of chewing gum found near the victim's body.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.desc: "I want you to find out who killed my husband." Three years ago, someone shot Count Maupassant to death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shortly after moving into the hideout in Riquewihr, Lupin wakes up to a broken bathroom. After bickering with Jigen for access to the bathroom, Fujiko appears.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: A string of indiscriminate shootings has struck Northern Africa. They're actually a challenge to Lupin from the wealthy Zylberstein.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's gang visits the Northern Angel, on the outskirts of Russia. What at first seems like a snowy, dull town turns out to be full of riches to the joy of the group of thieves.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Peoplelog"--a social media service that uses AI to analyze the incredible amount of data on the internet, allowing you to learn all about a person.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko has been captured. She's being held at Orig Island, the headquarters of Shake Hands. Lupin and the gang, including Ami, head there to find her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Papa! Save Lupin!" Ami is reunited with her long-last father. But Enzo is already obsessed with using Peoplelog to save the world.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin III has vanished from the internet. Meanwhile, the man himself is updating Peoplelog with confidential information that begins to throw the world into chaos.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin receives an invitation to join a race by Mr. X. Jigen and Goemon questions Lupin's willingness to join despite knowing it's a trap, but Lupin has his eyes on the Golden Statue rumored to be in a mansion near the race course.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #17: Tactics Of Angels
programme.desc: Lupin faces his toughest opponents yet! Four women known as the Bloody Angels are after the strange metallic sphere he stole from Area 51. To get their hands on potential alien technology, they're willing to do anything.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #19: The Elusiveness of the Fog
programme.desc: Lupin's attempt to steal a time machine causes a crazy mishap! Now stuck in ancient Japan, his team and Inspector Zenigata must join forces to get back to their own time. But notorious thief Lupin has enemies everywhere... and everywhen!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #20: Sweet Lost Night
programme.desc: Turns out the Magic Lamp is real, and Lupin's found a way to steal it! But this genie has a price: to grant his wish, she demands half his memories.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #21: The Last Job
programme.desc: Lupin and his companions have their sights on a Japanese cultural treasure, a priceless Buddha statue. But when a mysterious group of ninja thieves get the jump on them, it might just be the gang's last job!

programme.desc: Today on MAURY, Brian, his mom, and his sister deny Sarah's baby. Then, Robert always wanted a dad, but James always denied him. Plus it's grandmother versus grandmother in a DNA war that spans generations!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: According to Drew, the baby was given gin and died. Shawn, the grieving mother, claims she had no prior knowledge and believes it was tampered with, possibly by her own sister and friend. Who's responsible?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jeanette witnessed her husband John kissing a man named Russell, who was living with them, but John claims that Russell was trying to homewreck. Then Vanessa is desperate to put an end to her boyfriend Robert's constant accusations of cheating.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our guests today say they have no shame when it comes to affairs of the heart. They say their deceptive ways are catching up with them and that they need to tell the truth!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Erin's tired of playing house and is ready to tell Eric she's been cheating, and she's moving on! Then Bill's been cheating on his girlfriend for some time and is ready to move on. But wait until she hears he's been sleeping with her step-sister!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Justin says that Ashley's so overbearing and protective that it drove him to cheat on her with her lifelong friend Erica. Then, Tina is here to confront her sister Ruthie for cheating with her man Tony.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Terrance cheats on Ladonna and Latria for 4 years. Kramer cheats on his lazy girlfriend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Carl is here today to tell his girlfriend that he's been sleeping with her sworn enemy, Keisha. Next Donte will tell his best friend, Quincy, that he's sleeping with his fiancé. Later Janel and Nikkie are fighting over the same man.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Niki is here to beg her sister, Margerie, to leave her cheating husband, Chris. But Margerie claims to still love him even though he's still seeing Rhonda. However, Rhonda tells Chris she's fed up with his lying and she won't be fooled!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chris claims that Brianna's very controlling and doesn't let him go out to do the things that make him happy. Then, Chad is here to propose to his girlfriend Star but before they book the caterer, Star has a little confession to make.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Cindy feels no love at all for her sister, Morgan. She will tell her today that she is stealing Morgan's man for good! Next Emario wants to marry Kathryn, but first she needs to come clean and reveal her secret profession as a prostitute!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: These guests say love is the last thing on their minds, it is all about the sex and they're not sorry.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En esta edición especial de The Maury Show, Maury invita a celebridades al escenario para compartir algunas de las imágenes reales más intensas e impactantes jamás grabadas.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury dice: "¡Tú SÍ eres el padre!" ¿Pero son esas las palabras que los presuntos padres nerviosos quieren oír? ¿O "Tú NO eres el padre" pondrá a las madres en shock? ¡Averigua los resultados en el MAURY de hoy!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kyle niega ser el padre del hijo de Citasia. Su mamá dice que él miente. Entonces, Josh tuvo cinco hijos. Dana dice que más vale que se prepare para el sexto porque ella dice que es el padre de su bebé.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rachelle cree que su novio, Chris, puede estar siendo infiel con unas 50 mujeres, ¡incluyendo a su hermana! Entonces, Carrie se sorprendió al descubrir que su novio, Chris, mintió sobre su servicio militar.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Michael dice que él y Britny no tuvieron relaciones sexuales lo suficiente como para que ella quedara embarazada. Shekeita y su hermana Natasha están aquí para demostrar que Kieary es el verdadero padre del bebé de Shekeita.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: El propio hermano de Terrazina, Tyson, cree que Simon no es el padre. ¿Probará Tyson que ella fue infiel y que Simon no es el padre de su hija? Después, William tendrá un acalorado debate con dos mujeres sobre la paternidad de sus hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Toni y Quintin regresan para averiguar quién es el padre de su hijo. ¡Esta vez se preguntarán si Toni fue infiel! ¡Jenny tiene que saber si su hijo es de su esposo o de su amiga! Finalmente, ¿Vivian pondrá fin a la búsqueda de su hijo de 30 años?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maurio dice que no es padre de 5 hijos. Cuando se revelen los cinco análisis, ¿se demostrará que tiene razón o será un perdedor? ¡La familia de Jon dice que él no es el padre del bebé de Courtney! ¿Los resultados de la prueba dirán lo contrario?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿La esposa del pastor Terry lo engañó con 200 hombres diferentes? A continuación, Naomi quiere averiguar si su prometido, Jesse, es un infiel. ¿Qué revelarán los resultados en Maury hoy?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kiki y su hermana Sad-e aseguran que el novio de Kiki, Tavon, es un infiel. ¿Qué dirán cuando aparezca en nuestra cámara oculta? Entonces, ¿los hijos de James y Nikkie son realmente suyos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Keisha sabe que Desmond es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero él la quiere fuera de su vida! Después, dos madres desesperadas se enfrentan al padre de sus tres hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: La furiosa mamá Patty quiere demostrar que el novio de su hija, Dale, un hombre que duplica la edad de su hija, ha sido infiel. ¿Entonces Bam fue infiel a Brianna en su propia cama?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Grace, la madre de Eddie, no los va a dejar vivir con ella a menos que Kay Kay pueda demostrar que su hijo, Eddie, es el padre de su nieto. Después, Troy niega ser el padre de los cinco hijos de Vanessa.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Estas mujeres han venido con preguntas urgentes! Kendra quiere que su esposo Richard admita que es el padre de su hijo Y del hijo de su amante! ¡Jevon y su familia no creen que él sea el padre del hijo de Jazmine! ¡Solo MAURY tiene las respuestas!
